title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI tools to accelerate development, with some teams deploying daily. The company claims it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 and completed a large Java upgrade 6x faster using AI assistance.
